info.name: MenteCart Backend API - Full Validation & Scenario Suite
info.description: Comprehensive Postman suite for MenteCart backend covering success flows, validation failures, conflict cases, booking status guards, cart expiry checks, and PayHere notification scenarios.

item.name: Register - Success (201)
item.description: Creates a fresh user on every run by generating a random email.

item.name: Get Service by ID - Success & Capture Slot (200)
Get Service by ID - With bookingDate Filter (200)
Get Service by ID - Invalid bookingDate (400 Validation)
Get Service by ID - Not Found (404)

exec: const captured = items.find((item) => item.slotId === pm.collectionVariables.get("slot_id")) || items[0];

item.name: Add Item - Invalid serviceId format (400 Validation)
Add Item - Invalid slotId format (400 Validation)
Add Item - Invalid bookingDate format (400 Validation)
Add Item - Invalid Slot for Service (400)
Update Cart Item - Invalid Quantity (400 Validation)
Update Cart Item - Item Not Found (404)
Remove Cart Item - Item Not Found (404)
Cart Expiry Scenario - Start (Add Item)
item.description: Run this request, wait 16 minutes (CART_ITEM_EXPIRY_MINUTES=15), then run "Cart Expiry Scenario - Verify" to validate cleanup + released capacity.

exec: console.warn("Run this request at least 15 minutes after the start step to validate expiry cleanup.");

item.name: Checkout - Daily Limit Scenario (Run Repeatedly Until 409)
item.description: Run this request repeatedly (with cart prep before each run) on the same booking_date to trigger DAILY_LIMIT_REACHED once MAX_BOOKINGS_PER_DAY is exceeded.

item.name: Prepare Cart - For Online Checkout Success

exec: throw new Error("Missing PayHere variables: payhere_merchant_id, payhere_merchant_secret, payment_order_id, payhere_amount");

item.name: PayHere Notify - Duplicate Notification (200)
item.description: Run after a successful PayHere Notify request using the same payload.

exec: throw new Error("Missing PayHere variables: payhere_merchant_id, payhere_merchant_secret, payment_order_id, payhere_amount");

item.name: PayHere Notify - Amount Mismatch (200 Not Processed)
Get Booking by ID - Not Found (404)
Prepare Cart - For Pending Booking Cancellation
Checkout - Online Pending for Cancel Flow (201)
